acceptable_use_policy: Data is used for law enforcement purposes only. Data is owned by Marin County County Sheriff's Office and is never sold to 3rd parties.
prohibited_uses: Immigration enforcement, traffic enforcement, harassment or intimidation, usage based solely on a protected class (i.e. race, sex, religion), Personal use.
access_policy: All system access requires a valid reason and is stored indefinitely.
hotlist_policy: Hotlist hits are required to be human verified prior to action.
overview: Marin County County Sheriff's Office uses Flock Safety technology to capture objective evidence without compromising on individual privacy. Marin County County Sheriff's Office utilizes retroactive search to solve crimes after they've occurred. Additionally, Marin County County Sheriff's Office utilizes real time alerting of hotlist vehicles to capture wanted criminals. In an effort to ensure proper usage and guardrails are in place, they have made the below policies and usage statistics available to the public.
